title: Yedi Kalachi Lyrics Thenmerku Paruvakaatru
stanzas:
Yedi Kalachi Song Lyrics Thenmerku Paruvakaatru
#NRRaghunanthan #VijayPrakash #ShreyaGhosal

yedi kallachi
enna theriyalayaa
podi vellachi
enna puriyalayaa

nenju nongudhu
nongudhu unna
un kaal rendu
pogudhu pinna

naan mutham poda
thudikkuren unna
nee mullakatti
adikkura kanna

nee kaaithaanaa
pazhamthaana
sonnaal enna.
yedi kalllachi ..

attamagam pola vandhu
anga inga meyuva
athuvaana kaattil
vittu athukittu pova

mulla thechcha aadupola
nenjukuli noga
muttayitta kaadai engae
kaatta vittu poga

.. aatu komiyam kooda
oru vaaram vaasam varum
kirukkethum maaman sollu
marunaalu maarividum

nana mombala kirukkula valla
en puthiyil veronnum illa
naan udumbukku porandhavan pulla
sonna oru sollum
maaruvadhilla.

nee verum vaaya
mellaadha vilayaattilla
Yedi kallachi ..

Aandipatti thazhugaavil
pombalaikka panjam
aagamoththam unna kandu
aadi pochu nenjam

pitham konjam koodi pona
ippadithaan kenjum
sathaam podum nenju kootta
saathi vaiiyi konjam

kodi odum sakkaravalli
theriyaama kezhangu vaikkum
adhupola pombala saathi
ariyaama manasu vaikkum

nee pattunu munna
vandhu nillu.
en pottula adichi
nee sollu

ini namakkula
edhukkuyaa mullu.
ada naavukku thooramilla
pallu.

naan mudipoda
ready thaandi
mudivaa sollu.

yedi kallachi
enna theriyalayaa
podi vellachi
enna puriyalayaa

nenju nongudhu
nongudhu unna
un kaal rendu
pogudhu pinna

naan mutham poda
thudikkuren unna
nee mullakatti
adikkura kanna

nee kaaithaanaa
pazhamthaana
sonnaal enna.
yedi kalllachi ..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Yedi Kalachi'?

'Yedi Kalachi' expresses deep emotions of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic relationships.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Thenmerku Paruvakaatru'?

In Thenmerku Paruvakaatru, the song reflects the protagonist's feelings of love and desire, enhancing the narrative of the film.

Who are the singers of 'Yedi Kalachi'?

The song features the talented voices of Shreya Ghoshal and Vijay Prakash.

Who composed the music for 'Yedi Kalachi'?

The music for this beautiful track was composed by N. R. Raghunanthan.

When was 'Yedi Kalachi' released?

'Yedi Kalachi' was released on October 17, 2010.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Yedi Kalachi' from the movie Thenmerku Paruvakaatru beautifully encapsulates the feelings of love and longing. Sung by the melodious voices of Shreya Ghoshal and Vijay Prakash, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and romance. The poignant lyrics by Vairamuthu combined with N. R. Raghunanthan's soulful composition create an emotional atmosphere. This song resonates with anyone who has experienced the complexities of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yedi Kalachi from Thenmerku Paruvakaatru beautifully captures the essence of longing and love through its enchanting melodies. The collaboration between Shreya Ghoshal and Vijay Prakash brings a unique charm that resonates deeply with listeners. With N. R. Raghunanthan's masterful composition and Vairamuthu's poignant lyrics, this song is a must-listen for anyone who appreciates heartfelt music.
stanzaMeanings: Do you not know what a fool I am? Do you not understand what a little fool I am?
My heart is aching, aching, your two feet are leaving me behind.
I am getting ready to kiss you, while you are hitting me with your thorny eyes.
If you say you are a fruit, what does that mean?
Like a storm, it comes and goes, leaving behind the truth.
Like a thorn that has been removed, my heart is aching, where will it go now?
Even the playful wind brings a week of trouble, and the uncle says that the past will change.
I am not someone who can be easily fooled; I have nothing new to say. I am just a child born to the body, and I won't change my words.
You are just a game that doesn't play softly.
In the lowlands of Aandipatti, I saw you and my heart danced.
When my grandfather passed away, my heart became heavy, and I felt a little sad.
Like a sugarcane that is crushed without knowing, the heart of a girl keeps it hidden.
You came and stood in front of me, and you told me to hit you.
Now, what is the thorn for us? There is no distance for our tongue.
I am ready to finish; tell me when to end.
Do you not know what a fool I am? Do you not understand what a little fool I am?
My heart is aching, aching, your two feet are leaving me behind.
I am getting ready to kiss you, while you are hitting me with your thorny eyes.
If you say you are a fruit, what does that mean?
